formula: I hear a manipulation trying to make me think A, feel B, do C. Instead, I choose to think X, feel Y, do Z.

example.manipulation: Do you always nitpick over little things?
example.response: I hear a manipulation trying to make me think that I'm nitpicky, feel embarrassed, and turn a blind eye to mistakes. Instead, I choose to think that attention to detail matters, feel calm, and keep asking clarifying questions.
